title: Verify content is locked after trial cancellation
description: Test that all premium content is inaccessible after user cancels their trial
preconditions: User is on homepage or content browsing section

steps.description: 1. Log in with a user who has cancelled their trial
2. Navigate to homepage or content library
3. Try to access any premium content

expected_result: All content sections show locked state. Content is not playable and user sees upgrade/paywall prompt
